steps.name: Given I am logged in as "standard_user"
Click locator('.inventory_item').filter({ has: locator('.inventory_item_name').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }) }).locator('button:has-text("Add to cart")')
Given I have added product "Sauce Labs Backpack" to the cart
